title: 12 Pcs Christmas Glitter Leaves, 37cm Shiny Eucalyptus Stems Sparkling Eucalyptus Branches Stems Glitter Foliage Decor for Xmas Tree Vase fillers Party Home Holiday Ornament (Rose Gold)
features: Festive Elegance: Add a touch of shimmering elegance to your holiday decor with our 12-piece set of Christmas glitter leaves. Each pick measures 38cm, perfect for your vase fillers or home ornaments.
Quality Craftsmanship: Each Christmas glitter leaves are meticulously designed for durability and aesthetic appeal, ensuring long-lasting sparkle and charm throughout the holiday season and beyond.

Sparkling Holiday Decor: Transform your space into a winter wonderland with these dazzling eucalyptus stems. The glitter foliage create a magical ambiance for parties, gatherings, and festive celebrations.

Versatile Usage: Whether adorning your Christmas tree, embellishing your holiday centerpieces, or adding a festive touch to DIY crafts, these shiny eucalyptus stems are versatile and easy to incorporate into your seasonal decorations.

Ideal Gift: Surprise friends, family, or colleagues with this enchanting set of sparkling eucalyptus branches stems. Perfect for holiday gifts or as a thoughtful gesture for anyone who loves to decorate for Christmas.
description: Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest glitter.
